extractedText:
Hey,

You have questions and the prophets have your answer. If you are
truly intrigued, watch the time. We've lost about 45 days in the
past 4 years. The shortening of days, this is why the Vatican is a
sun dial and also simultaneously a key hole. Another thing while I'm
here if you want the secret to everything compare plasma next to
brain cells. The sun+moon are composed of plasma (simply light)
(not planets) after this is cemented in your psyche ponder the
current whereabouts of where you, |, and humanity reside.

Cheers!
